commands.review_summary:
The PR adds shared/backend and web publish validation for scoped package owner mismatches, soft-delete audit/runtime-id handling, publish route migration with redirects, route-name reservations, docs, tests, and security metadata updates.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main passes an explicit or inferred owner handle into publish target resolution without comparing it to the scoped package name. I did not execute a live publish flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer handling for the CLI preflight gap and adjacent route/soft-delete policy choices, so this is not a safe automated repair lane item.
